sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11940" key="a)perisa/lpigktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπερι-σάλπιγκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not surrounded by the sound of trumpets,</tr_> Pyrrhusap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.13.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
